cards.name: Hobbit
cards.abilityDescription: Restores 5% of MAX HP after each attack

cards.name: Squire
cards.abilityDescription: Reflects 25% of incoming damage back at the attacker on every hit

cards.name: Goblin
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack deals random damage — anywhere from 50% to 200% of ATK

cards.name: Peasant
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start: increases all allies' MAX HP by 8%

cards.name: Archer
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack strikes two random enemies — primary takes 90% ATK, secondary takes 45% ATK

cards.name: Witch
cards.abilityDescription: After each attack: ignites enemy — 7% MAX HP damage when they attack, for 3 turns (resets timer)

cards.name: Knight
cards.abilityDescription: Takes 20% less damage from all sources

cards.name: Ghost
cards.abilityDescription: 15% chance to dodge — each dodge permanently boosts own ATK and MAX HP by 10%

cards.name: Druid
cards.abilityDescription: At the start of each turn heals the whole allied team for 5% of their MAX HP

cards.name: Golem
cards.abilityDescription: This card has 2x MAX HP but deals 25% less damage

cards.name: Paladin
cards.abilityDescription: Starts with a full-absorb shield that blocks the first incoming hit completely

cards.name: Griffon
cards.abilityDescription: First attack on each enemy deals 50% more damage. Survive the first lethal hit and gain 20% dodge chance and 15% damage.

cards.name: Skeleton
cards.abilityDescription: Revives once at 30% HP upon death

cards.name: Spider
cards.abilityDescription: Takes double damage from all sources, but has a 35% chance to stun the attacker after each hit

cards.name: Bone Mage
cards.abilityDescription: When this card attacks, poison two random enemy cards. Every new enemy poisoned: gain 6% damage and heal 3% of max HP.

cards.name: Dark Knight
cards.abilityDescription: Gains +15% of current ATK after each attack

cards.name: Mummy
cards.abilityDescription: Deal 50% more damage to poisoned enemies. On death, revive at 35% HP with 20% less damage and poison all enemies for 3 turns.

cards.name: Pixie
cards.abilityDescription: Whenever Pixie takes damage, grant all living allies a shield equal to 6% of Pixie's MAX HP (up to 30% total)

cards.name: Shadow Rogue
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack permanently reduces the enemy's ATK by 15%

cards.name: Shadow Panther
cards.abilityDescription: 30% chance to dodge an attack and counter for 20% of incoming damage
